notes: Arrhenius fit uses target temperatures 600/700/800 K. The reported room-temperature conductivity is a first-pass upper-bound Nernst-Einstein estimate based on tracer diffusion, total Li number density, and Haven ratio = 1. It should not be treated as a final experimental-comparable value.
